node.statement: (Dimension calculation). The self-adjoint part of the commutant has real dimension: dim_R(π_φ(A)'^{sa}) = dim_R((⊕_{j=1}^k M_{n_j}(C))^{sa}) = Σ_{j=1}^k dim_R(M_{n_j}(C)^{sa}) = Σ_{j=1}^k n_j² (since the self-adjoint (Hermitian) n_j × n_j matrices form a real vector space of dimension n_j²). Combining with the bound from Node 1.3: Σ_{j=1}^k n_j² ≤ m + 1. This is part (II) of the main theorem.
